title: stelis lindleyana
intro: Stelis lindleyana is a species of orchid, a type of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, Stelis lindleyana has been used in medicine due to its reported anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful for treating various health conditions. The plant has been known to offer health benefits such as wound healing, immune system support, and the potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Stelis lindleyana is typically prepared as a tea or tincture for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a treatment.
